name: opengrove
description: Open-source personal knowledge agent for calm, organized work.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.check: npm run check:secrets && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:harness: npm run build:server && node dist/tests/skill-harness.js && node dist/tests/kernel-knowledge-harness.js && node dist/tests/native-skill-publisher-harness.js && node dist/tests/claude-code-runtime-harness.js && node dist/tests/hermes-runtime-harness.js && node dist/tests/bridge-kernel-selection-harness.js
